title: Occupational Therapy Department Home
body: Welcome to the Occupational Therapy department space at Bitterroot Rehab. Start here for protocols, assessment frameworks, and handouts.

title: Community Wellness Circle - Session Format and Curriculum
body: Twelve-week community wellness circle curriculum covering pacing, sleep hygiene, pain science education, and graded activity. Includes weekly session outlines and facilitator notes.

title: Pacing and Energy Conservation - Handout Library
body: Library of participant handouts on activity pacing and energy conservation, including the outdoor pacing application for the Missoula participant population.

title: Sleep Hygiene and Activity Balance Handout (2026 Update)
body: Updated 2026 handout on sleep hygiene and balancing rest with activity for participants managing chronic pain group.

title: HTCC Certification Requirements and Study Plan
body: Hand Therapy Certification Commission requirements, eligibility criteria, and Frank's structured study plan toward CHT recertification.

title: Hand Therapy CEU - Bozeman Nov 2026 Course Notes
body: Pre-reading notes and takeaways for the Bozeman November 2026 hand therapy intensive (Nov 14-16).

title: Level II Fieldwork Supervision - Jasmine Park Spring 2026
body: Supervision log and competency tracking for Jasmine Park's Level II fieldwork rotation, Spring 2026. Mid-point review scheduled Apr 22.

title: Fieldwork Educator Competency Checklist
body: Competency checklist used to evaluate fieldwork students at week 12 and at the mid-point review.

title: Occupational Therapy Evaluation and Goal-Setting Protocol
body: Standard Occupational Therapy evaluation workflow and goal-setting protocol, with references drawn from the wrist rehab population.

title: Pain Science Education Module Outlines
body: Module-by-module outlines for pain science participant education, including module 3 slides on central sensitization and professional metaphors.

title: Interdisciplinary chronic pain group Protocol (occupational-therapy-trainer-SLP)
body: Shared interdisciplinary protocol for chronic pain group care across Occupational Therapy, trainer, and SLP, including PSFS outcome measure integration and communication strategies.

title: Static Wrist Splint Fabrication - Step-by-Step Guide
body: Step-by-step static wrist splint fabrication guide, including notes on Orfit Classic thermoplastic softening temperatures.

title: CEU Log and Professional Development Tracker 2024-2026
body: Shared CEU log and professional development tracker for Occupational Therapy staff, 2024-2026. Add your own section under your name.

title: ADL Assessment Framework - KATZ and goal measure Reference
body: Reference guide for ADL assessment using the KATZ Index and the Canadian Occupational Performance Measure (goal measure).

title: privacy Compliance Checklist for Occupational Therapy Documentation
body: privacy compliance checklist for Occupational Therapy documentation and annual training confirmation requirements.

title: Occupational Therapy Student Onboarding Guide - Bitterroot Rehab
body: Onboarding guide for Occupational Therapy students at Bitterroot Rehab covering documentation culture, expectations, and orientation steps.

title: Evidence Brief - Occupational Therapy in chronic pain group Management 2025
body: 2025 evidence brief summarizing the role of Occupational Therapy in chronic pain group management, supporting the expanded pain group offering.

title: Project Note Documentation Standards - Occupational Therapy
body: Documentation standards and project note templates for Occupational Therapy entries in the EHR.

title: Community Wellness Circle Curriculum v1 (2022-2023)
body: Archived first version of the community wellness circle curriculum used 2022-2023, retained for reference.

title: Frank Schultz - Annual Goals and Professional Focus 2026
body: Frank's 2026 annual goals and professional focus, including the HTCC certification goal and the student supervision initiative.
